channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump weaves midterm campaign messaging into primetime address on election security
item.description: President Trump delivered a primetime speech on election security, but also included a strong endorsement of his second-term agenda.

item.title: Trump declassifies evidence alleging major vulnerabilities in election system
item.description: China has obtained U.S. voter lists, many noncitizens are registered, and Venezuela has attempted interference, according to declassified evidence.

item.title: DHS: Over 250,000 Noncitizens Registered to Vote in Four States
item.description: Newly released data shows more than 250,000 noncitizens are illegally registered to vote in California, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Nevada.

item.title: A Not-So-Gay Holiday
item.description: A gay cruise heads to the Middle East, raising questions about potential challenges.
